# ast-grep-practice

> Operate ast-grep as a project lint tool. Covers sgconfig.yml, fix/rewrite rules, constraints, transform, testing, and CI. Use when writing rules ast-grep can express but general-purpose linters cannot.

## Install

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/tooling/ast-grep-practice
```

For a reproducible setup, declare it in `apm.yml` instead:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/tooling/ast-grep-practice
```

then run `apm install`.

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
